text: Stepping past the glass doors and into this brightly lit, modern space, I sense an atmosphere of curiosity and forward motion. The R+D display beckons me into an embrace of research, reflection, and innovation. I feel both small and expansive here, as if the possibilities of human intelligence and connection are laid bare before me. There’s a gentle excitement at the idea of worlds—intellectual, technological, emotional—unfolding in collaboration rather than isolation. The space feels like an invitation to wonder together.
